THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CULP, BARBARA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1670 OAKDALE AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL JUN-30-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, EVICTION STAYED UNTIL 5PM ON 6-30-97. SECURITY DEPOSIT RETURNED ACCORDING TO LAW. PLTF TO PAY TO DEFT THE SUM OF $500 BY 5PM ON 6-30-97. IF DEFT DEFAULTS, PLTF MAY FILE DECLARATION OF NON-COMPLIANCE WITH 24HRS NOTICE & SEEK AMENDED JUDGMNT FOR BACK RENT & COSTS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
